title: Craftable Webs
description: This datapack allows you to craft cobwebs,useful for private minecraft smps
body:
### 🕸 Craftable Cobwebs – SMP Datapack

Tired of scouring mineshafts or strongholds just to get your hands on a few cobwebs? With this datapack, **cobwebs are now fully craftable**, making them easier to obtain for traps, decorations, or PvP strategies.

#### 🔧 How to Craft:

> **Shapeless Recipe**
>
> * 9x String → 4x Cobweb

Whether you're setting up a sneaky PvP trap or designing a spooky build, this simple datapack adds a touch of convenience without breaking the vanilla balance.

#### 🛠 SMP Friendly – No Mods Needed!

* Fully compatible with multiplayer
* Survival-friendly
* Lightweight and lag-free


Side Note: You are not allowed to distribute this datapack and claim it as yours.If you want to make a video about the datapack,credit me and link the this page in the description
